message:
fix(ci): exclude TUI feature from CI/release builds and enable workflow_call

The TUI feature depends on local-path frankentui crates that don't exist
in CI. Add CI_FEATURES env var to build with --no-default-features
--features cli,daemon,sqlite across all workflow jobs. Add workflow_call
trigger to ci.yml so release.yml can use it as a reusable quality gate.
Remove TUI-specific test steps from the dashboard job (tested locally).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,11 +5,15 @@ on:
     branches: [main]
   pull_request:
     branches: [main]
+  workflow_call:
 
 env:
   CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
   CARGO_INCREMENTAL: 0
   RUSTFLAGS: -D warnings
+  # TUI feature depends on local-path frankentui crates unavailable in CI.
+  # Build with all features except tui.
+  CI_FEATURES: --no-default-features --features cli,daemon,sqlite
 
 jobs:
   check:
@@ -23,9 +27,8 @@ jobs:
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - name: Check formatting
         run: cargo fmt --check
-      - name: Run clippy (default features)
-        run: cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
-      # TUI is always compiled — no separate feature-gated clippy needed
+      - name: Run clippy
+        run: cargo clippy $CI_FEATURES --all-targets -- -D warnings
 
   unit:
     name: Unit Tests
@@ -36,18 +39,16 @@ jobs:
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - name: Run unit tests
-        run: cargo test --lib -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee unit-test-output.txt
-      # TUI is always compiled — tests run with default features above
+        run: cargo test $CI_FEATURES --lib -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee unit-test-output.txt
       - name: Run binary tests
-        run: cargo test --bin sbh -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee bin-test-output.txt
+        run: cargo test $CI_FEATURES --bin sbh -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee bin-test-output.txt
       - name: Upload test logs
         if: always()
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: unit-test-logs
           path: |
             unit-test-output.txt
-            unit-test-tui-output.txt
             bin-test-output.txt
           retention-days: 14
 
@@ -60,7 +61,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - name: Run integration tests
-        run: cargo test --test integration_tests -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee integration-output.txt
+        run: cargo test $CI_FEATURES --test integration_tests -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee integration-output.txt
       - name: Upload test logs
         if: always()
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
@@ -78,9 +79,9 @@ jobs:
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - name: Run proof harness
-        run: cargo test --test proof_harness -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee proof-harness-output.txt
+        run: cargo test $CI_FEATURES --test proof_harness -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee proof-harness-output.txt
       - name: Run decision plane e2e
-        run: cargo test --test decision_plane_e2e -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee decision-plane-e2e-output.txt
+        run: cargo test $CI_FEATURES --test decision_plane_e2e -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee decision-plane-e2e-output.txt
       - name: Upload decision plane logs
         if: always()
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
@@ -92,43 +93,25 @@ jobs:
           retention-days: 30
 
   dashboard:
-    name: Dashboard / TUI Tests
+    name: Dashboard Tests
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     needs: check
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
-      - name: TUI replay + scenario drills
-        run: |
-          cargo test --lib tui::test_replay -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee tui-replay-output.txt
-          cargo test --lib tui::test_scenario_drills -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee tui-scenarios-output.txt
-      - name: TUI property + fault injection tests
-        run: |
-          cargo test --lib tui::test_properties -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee tui-properties-output.txt
-          cargo test --lib tui::test_fault_injection -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee tui-fault-injection-output.txt
-      - name: TUI parity + snapshots + benchmarks
-        run: |
-          cargo test --lib tui::parity_harness -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee tui-parity-output.txt
-          cargo test --lib tui::test_snapshot_golden -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee tui-snapshots-output.txt
-          cargo test --lib tui::test_operator_benchmark -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee tui-benchmarks-output.txt
+      # TUI tests skipped — tui feature requires local-path frankentui crates
+      # unavailable in CI. TUI is tested locally only.
       - name: Dashboard integration tests
-        run: cargo test --test dashboard_integration_tests -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee dashboard-integration-output.txt
+        run: cargo test $CI_FEATURES --test dashboard_integration_tests -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee dashboard-integration-output.txt
       - name: Fallback verification
-        run: cargo test --test fallback_verification -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee fallback-output.txt
+        run: cargo test $CI_FEATURES --test fallback_verification -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee fallback-output.txt
       - name: Upload dashboard test logs
         if: always()
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: dashboard-test-logs
           path: |
-            tui-replay-output.txt
-            tui-scenarios-output.txt
-            tui-properties-output.txt
-            tui-fault-injection-output.txt
-            tui-parity-output.txt
-            tui-snapshots-output.txt
-            tui-benchmarks-output.txt
             dashboard-integration-output.txt
             fallback-output.txt
           retention-days: 30
@@ -142,7 +125,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - name: Build release binary
-        run: cargo build --release
+        run: cargo build $CI_FEATURES --release
       - name: Run E2E test suite
         run: |
           chmod +x scripts/e2e_test.sh
@@ -169,7 +152,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - name: Run stress tests
-        run: cargo test --test stress_tests -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee stress-output.txt
+        run: cargo test $CI_FEATURES --test stress_tests -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee stress-output.txt
       - name: Upload stress logs
         if: always()
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
@@ -188,12 +171,12 @@ jobs:
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - name: Run artifact contract tests
         run: |
-          cargo test --lib -- cli::tests::ci_release_targets --nocapture
-          cargo test --lib -- cli::tests::builds_expected_asset_names --nocapture
-          cargo test --lib -- cli::tests::validates_release_asset_contract --nocapture
+          cargo test $CI_FEATURES --lib -- cli::tests::ci_release_targets --nocapture
+          cargo test $CI_FEATURES --lib -- cli::tests::builds_expected_asset_names --nocapture
+          cargo test $CI_FEATURES --lib -- cli::tests::validates_release_asset_contract --nocapture
       - name: Validate archive naming matches contract
         run: |
-          cargo build --release
+          cargo build $CI_FEATURES --release
           # Build archive using contract naming and verify structure.
           TARGET=$(rustc -vV | grep host | awk '{print $2}')
           ARCHIVE="sbh-${TARGET}.tar.xz"
@@ -225,7 +208,7 @@ jobs:
           echo "  \"rustc_version\": \"$(rustc --version)\"," >> provenance/ci-metadata.json
           echo "  \"cargo_version\": \"$(cargo --version)\"" >> provenance/ci-metadata.json
           echo "}" >> provenance/ci-metadata.json
-          cargo tree --depth 1 > provenance/dependency-tree.txt
+          cargo tree $CI_FEATURES --depth 1 > provenance/dependency-tree.txt
           cat provenance/ci-metadata.json
       - name: Upload provenance
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4

@@ -9,6 +9,8 @@ env:
   CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
   CARGO_INCREMENTAL: 0
   RUSTFLAGS: -D warnings
+  # TUI feature depends on local-path frankentui crates unavailable in CI.
+  CI_FEATURES: --no-default-features --features cli,daemon,sqlite
 
 permissions:
   contents: write
@@ -51,9 +53,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: Build release binary
         run: |
           if [ "${{ matrix.cross }}" = "true" ]; then
-            cross build --release --target ${{ matrix.target }}
+            cross build $CI_FEATURES --release --target ${{ matrix.target }}
           else
-            cargo build --release --target ${{ matrix.target }}
+            cargo build $CI_FEATURES --release --target ${{ matrix.target }}
           fi
 
       - name: Package archive
